programmes.show_description: Crime thriller with Samuel L Jackson. A district attorney lets a felon go free due to his own guilt, but is compelled to personally bring him to justice when the man goes on a killing spree. (2014)
Airborne action with Kelsey Grammer. A professional thief who owes the mob a large sum of money is forced to rob a futuristic flying casino filled with the world's most dangerous criminals. (2020)
Legend returns soon.
Put the pleasure back into shopping from the comfort of your home and choose from a selection of innovative products.
Chuck Norris fights crime and helps the community as the eponymous Walker. Carlos' nephew is in trouble with the law when a gun is found in his room... S6, Ep11
An old friend of Hooker is arrested for a series of hold-ups at local supermarkets, but the cop is not convinced of his guilt and sets out to bring the culprits to book. S2, Ep2
Alien invasion drama. Vincent investigates when a young girl who witnessed an alien's death and vaporisation near to a religious shrine puts the event down to a holy miracle.
Giant monster mayhem with fan-favourite sci-fi star Summer Glau. A crashed meteor sends a malevolent alien into the preserved remains of a mammoth that runs amok with devastating effects. (2006)
Take a look at all the latest movies and series coming your way this month!
WWII drama with Robert Wagner. The arrogant owner of a cotton plantation is forced to reassess his attitude when he is drafted into the army and clashes with his sadistic captain. (1956)
Take a look at all the latest movies and series coming your way this month!
British war drama. While grieving the death of his brother, flying ace Douglas Miller attempts to lead a Lancaster bomber crew in the pivotal aerial war over Berlin in 1944. (2019)
Kirk and the Enterprise crew are sent on an emergency mission to find a cure for a deadly plague - but their efforts are hampered by a miners' strike. S3, Ep21/24
When a dying alien wounds a police patrolman, Vincent arrives to investigate but finds that the local authorities are far from cooperative.
Vince's fellow cops - including Hooker - criticise him for not exacting revenge by shooting a fleeing juvenile responsible for killing an officer. S2, Ep3
Chuck Norris is Walker in this modern martial arts western. A girl is the only witness to Trent's stabbing attack, and the Rangers need her to identify the assailant. S6, Ep12
Crime drama with Matthew McConaughey. An unlucky prospector teams up with a geologist and sets off on a journey to find gold in the uncharted jungle of Indonesia. (2016)
Crime thriller with Danny Dyer. A reformed ex-convict and his friend embark on a series of increasingly desperate scams to gather £100,000 to repay a loan shark before his mother is killed. (2009)
Action thriller with Steven Seagal. An Interpol agent goes on a rampage through the Eastern European underworld to hunt down the Russian gun smugglers responsible for killing his partner. (2010)
Tense thriller with Brian Cox. An elderly, reclusive widower is left distraught when his beloved dog is murdered by three teenagers, and decides to dish out justice by any means necessary. (2008)
Legend returns soon.
Innovative, value-for-money products brought directly to you at home. Shop 'til you drop whilst avoiding the hustle and bustle of the High Street.
Chuck Norris is Walker in this modern martial arts western. A girl is the only witness to Trent's stabbing attack, and the Rangers need her to identify the assailant. S6, Ep12
Vince's fellow cops - including Hooker - criticise him for not exacting revenge by shooting a fleeing juvenile responsible for killing an officer. S2, Ep3
When a dying alien wounds a police patrolman, Vincent arrives to investigate but finds that the local authorities are far from cooperative.
Sci-fi action starring Fay Gauthier. Aliens invade Earth and give the planet's population an ultimatum - emigrate to a new planet, or be killed... (2016)

Western adventure with Kenny Rogers. After losing his job, a former rodeo champion leaves his home in Texas behind for a job herding mustangs in Wyoming. (1985)
Take a look at all the latest movies and series coming your way this month!
Western with Marlon Brando. A cowboy swears revenge on the bandit chieftain who stole his prize stallion and ended his dream of owning a stud farm. (1966)
Take a look at all the latest movies and series coming your way this month!
Kirk and Spock are invited to participate in a battle between good and evil, fighting for their lives against some of the most sinister characters from the history of the universe. S3, Ep22/24
An alien woman arranges to meet Vincent to discuss the possibility of defecting and supplying information, however, fellow Invaders are in pursuit determined to silence her.
Hooker persuades a blind witness to testify against murderous thieves, knowing that she's putting herself in great danger. S2, Ep4
Chuck Norris fights crime and helps the community as the eponymous Walker. A principal of a high school has his suspicions about another teacher... S6, Ep13
Tense sci-fi thriller with Aaron Eckhart. A platoon of soldiers is sent into battle against an alien invasion force that has landed on America's west coast. (2011)
Action adventure, directed by and starring Clint Eastwood. An ex-assassin is blackmailed into eliminating a target who is on a expedition, sending the hit-man on a perilous climb up the Eiger. (1975)
